LanguageData.HAR_Outerm.label: Outerm
LanguageData.HAR_Outerm.description:
Outerms are a kind of artificial race that has only begun appearing across the cosmos in recent years.
They are marked by an eerily glowing crimson halo and twisted, warped crowlike wings.
No records of them exist in the databases of Canaan, the homeworld of the artificial races, and much about them remains a mystery.

Like other artificial races, they grow stronger as time passes,
and acquire a variety of uncanny powers as they advance through each stage.

They possess a decadent sensibility that delights in blood-pumping violence and drowning lust, making them intensely aggressive.
They despise rigid order and law, favoring corruption and decadence instead.
Perhaps because they live for the moment, they seem strangely detached from both life and death.

At the same time, they are deeply devout, worshipping the faceless god known as the "Void's ■■■."
Whatever form the divine command takes, they gladly obey it, even at the cost of their own lives.

In the underworld they have built the syndicate known as Haos, ruling drifters and criminals through drugs and violence.
With divine guidance, abundant funds, and plentiful resources, their influence seems to keep spreading even now.

Outerms are innately incapable of reproduction and cannot bear children.
How they continue to increase their numbers without any production plants of their own remains shrouded in darkness.




Good arrives in the wake of evil.
As if paving a bloodstained road into one fit for humankind.
LanguageData.HAR_Outerm.comps.HAR_OT_Comp_Skill_a.com: Bites and drains blood from a single target.\nActivation requirement: Artificial Race Lv 1\nReuse time: 30 minutes
LanguageData.HAR_Outerm.comps.HAR_OT_Comp_Skill_b.com: Summons three frenzied crows.\nActivation requirement: Artificial Race Lv 2\nReuse time: 3 hours
LanguageData.HAR_Outerm.comps.HAR_OT_Comp_Skill_c.com: Enters a state of chance-based evasion.\nActivation requirement: Artificial Race Lv 3\nReuse time: 1 day
LanguageData.HAR_Outerm.comps.HAR_OT_Comp_Skill_d.com: Temporarily paralyzes part of a single target's functions.\nActivation requirement: Artificial Race Lv 4\nReuse time: 1 hour
LanguageData.HAR_Outerm.comps.HAR_OT_Comp_Skill_e.com: Receives power from a higher plane and enters an empowered state.\nActivation requirement: Artificial Race Lv 5\nReuse time: 3 days
